3018680.name: Foxy J.A.B.S: Just Another Bubble Shooter
3018680.description:
Foxy J.A.B.S (Just Another Bubble Shooter) is a simple and relaxing game for everyone. To win you'll have to match at least three bubbles of the same color. You can use few handy power-ups placed on the map. But be careful! There are some nasty traps.

Each level has different goals to achieve: can you get five gifts, collect ten leaves or get a certain amount of bubbles? I'm sure you can!


### CHANGELOG ###
Version 1.1
- Removed power-ups that made game way too easy.
